conditions.name: peanut allergy with history of anaphylaxis

medications.name: fluticasone/salmeterol (Advair HFA 115/21)
medications.sig: 1 puff inhaled twice daily via spacer

medications.name: albuterol (ProAir HFA 90 mcg)

document_references.description: Documents routine fall telephone check-in with mother Priya Patel regarding Aisha's asthma management. Covers asthma stability over summer, mild increase in morning cough with fall allergen season and school re-entry, medication adherence review, plan to continue current regimen unchanged, and scheduling of influenza vaccine nurse visit for the following week.
